race.comment: CLENCH (8) finished fifth, beaten 1.5 lengths, when resuming from a spell last start over 1400m at Sunshine Coast Poly. Plenty of scope for improvement and is a great chance to break through. ARCTIC BRIGHT (10) has been kept fresh since finishing fourth last start over 1350m at Wyong. Leading player again. REGAL RINA (11) is a four-start maiden who finished fifth, beaten 4.5 lengths, when resuming from a spell last start over 1200m at Gold Coast. Bold showing expected with added fitness this time. WATCHYA LANGUAGE (7) gave away a big start at the top of the straight last start and finished 3 lengths from the winner in sixth over 1400m at Sunshine Coast Poly. Looks to be in the right race to figure in the finish.
